title: teramnus micans var. cyaneus
intro: Teramnus micans var. cyaneus, also known as the Blue Pea or Butterfly Pea, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Teramnus micans var. cyaneus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and act as a natural dye. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
